scripts.test:ai-live: playwright test e2e/05-ai-live-backend.spec.ts --config playwright.config.ts --project "秘书台 E2E Desktop"
scripts.test:ai-live:strict-chain: AI_LIVE_REQUIRE_STRICT_EXECUTION_CHAIN=1 playwright test e2e/05-ai-live-backend.spec.ts --config playwright.config.ts --project "秘书台 E2E Desktop"
scripts.test:ai-live-headed: playwright test e2e/06-chat-headed-live.spec.ts --config playwright.live.config.ts --project "秘书台 Live Headed" --headed
scripts.test:zijin-auth-headed: playwright test e2e/08-zijin-primary-auth-headed.spec.ts --config playwright.live.config.ts --project "子衿主授权 Live Headed" --headed
scripts.test:zijin-auth-headed:suite1: playwright test e2e/08-zijin-primary-auth-headed.spec.ts --config playwright.live.config.ts --project "子衿主授权 Live Headed" --headed --grep "1. Preflight"
scripts.test:zijin-auth-headed:suite3: playwright test e2e/08-zijin-primary-auth-headed.spec.ts --config playwright.live.config.ts --project "子衿主授权 Live Headed" --headed --grep "3. 真实"
scripts.test:ai-live-regression: pnpm run test:ai-live && pnpm run test:ai-live-headed
scripts.test:ai-live:release-gate: pnpm run test:ai-live:strict-chain && pnpm run test:ai-live-headed
